"Rules" for the series (I can't think of anything else better to call it.)

Rule number 1; Toodles, Coal, and Pebble will not be made in the series. This is self explanatory. (Does this even count as a rule?)

Rule number 2; This kinda ties in with the first rule but, I ask of you to not use a Toodles, Pebble or Coal persona. While I can't really enforce this rule, all my bots are set to unlimited and will without a doubt get their freak on one way or another.

Rule number 3; Have fun.
